title: Requirement Clause
description: Reference schema for extracted metadata from a compact requirement clause in a specification document. The title is a short descriptive label, the clause carries the normative behavior, notes carry rationale or examples, and the schema also recognizes backtick-delimited inline identifier references in prose alongside the narrowed BCP 14-style uppercase keyword set defined by the standard.

title.description: Short descriptive label for the requirement; it names the obligation or concern rather than restating the full clause.

clause.description: Normative requirement sentence or short paragraph that appears immediately after the requirement heading, may include backtick-delimited inline identifier references to canonical artifact IDs, and contains exactly one approved all-caps normative keyword phrase from the closed set.

normative_keyword.description: Approved all-caps normative keyword phrase extracted from the clause.

notes.description: Optional note lines associated with the requirement; notes may include inline identifier references and explanatory material.
